app.name: ChildBloom
app.disclaimer: ChildBloom is an informational tool and does not replace professional medical advice.

auth.confirmationSent: We've sent you a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account.

onboarding.setupSteps: Let's set up your profile in a few quick steps
onboarding.personalise: We'll use this to personalise your experience
onboarding.selectSituation: Select what best describes your situation
onboarding.readyToTrack: We're ready to track {{name}}'s development journey.
onboarding.guidePregnancy: We'll guide you through your pregnancy week by week.

dashboard.addChildStart: Add your child or pregnancy to get started with tracking.

askAi.title: Ask Dr. Bloom
askAi.subtitle: Paediatric guidance for {{name}}
askAi.askAnything: Ask about milestones, nutrition, sleep, vaccinations, or any concern.
askAi.suggestedQ1: What milestones should I expect this month?
askAi.suggestedQ2: My child isn't eating well — what should I do?
askAi.suggestedQ3: Which Indian foods are best for brain development?
askAi.suggestedQ4: How much sleep does my child need at this age?
askAi.suggestedQ5: Is it normal for my child to not talk yet?
askAi.suggestedQ6: Which vaccinations are due next as per IAP schedule?
askAi.errorMessage: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

growth.title: Growth Chart
growth.addFirst: Add your first measurement to start tracking growth.
growth.head: Head

food.title: Food Tracker
food.startTracking: Start tracking meals, breastfeeding, and food introductions.
food.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Enjoyed it, refused at first

health.title: Health Records
health.keepTrack: Keep track of vaccinations, doctor visits, and health events.

guides.title: Development Guides
guides.subtitle: Evidence-based guidance for every stage
guides.whoDisclaimer: These guides are based on WHO and IAP (Indian Academy of Pediatrics) recommendations. Always consult your paediatrician for personalised advice.

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.description: A child development companion for Indian parents.
settings.aboutDisclaimer: This app provides general guidance based on WHO and IAP recommendations. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice.
settings.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}}? This will also delete their records.

common.disclaimerText: ChildBloom is an informational tool and does not replace professional medical advice. Always consult your pediatrician for health concerns.
